name: amadeco/module-db-override
description: A module to enable experimental mariadb 12.X series before offical support is available.

suggest.magento/module-sales-rule: Enables the from_date/to_date reserved-word quoting fix for cart price-rule validity windows on MariaDB 12.x (ships with every standard Magento install).
suggest.smile/module-elasticsuite-catalog-optimi: Enables the same from_date/to_date quoting fix for the ElasticSuite optimizer validity-date filter when present (MariaDB 12.x). Provided by the smile/elasticsuite monorepo.
